match.userMessage:
A cinematic establishing shot for "Untitled Sequence". Opening scene: INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING

Bright natural window light floods a crisp white vanity. SCARLETT, 19, sun-kissed with loose blonde waves, sits before her microphone. She lifts the coral lipstick from its minimal packaging, fingers tracing the smooth matte case. Handheld camera drifts in close as she turns the bullet slowly, catching the warm glow.

SCARLETT (V.O.)
One shade. One summer.

MACRO DETAIL - LIPS

Scarlett swipes the creamy coral across her lower lip, blots gently, then smiles. Direct f Art style: Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save. Mood: Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool. Lighting: Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast. No text, no titles, no subtitles, no watermarks, no letters, no words, no signs, no UI elements.
